display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
① 创建项目
Project (type 决定风格/合规)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
② 灵感创作 (可选)
想法 → LLM → 多集大纲+剧本
InspirationDraft

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
③ 剧本管理
上传 docx/txt + 多集切分
Script + Scene

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
④ 剧本拆解
LLM 拆 人/景/物 文字设定
Asset (L0→L1)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
⑤ 美术工坊
AI 出形象图 + 图生图 + 确认主图
Asset 槽位 + MediaItem (L2→L3→L5)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
⑥ 分镜
LLM 生成镜头 + 合并组
Shot + ShotGroup

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
⑦ 绑定资产到生成段
AssetUsageBinding (@图片N/@音频N)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
⑧ 编译视频提示词
风格 + 资产媒体 + token 替换

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
⑨ 合规门禁 (仅 AI_REAL)
CHARACTER 须 APPROVED

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
⑩ 视频生成 (抽卡)
队列 → Provider → MediaItem
GenerationAttempt + CostLedger

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: ⑪ 预览 / 采纳 / 重抽
